name: Wave 1: core runtime authority / architecture / batch 1
description: Small focused packet for 2 open bug(s). Uses auto/* routing so Praxis can choose lower-cost admitted models where suitable.
outcome_goal: Drive BUG-9BB04947, BUG-DFC8607C to proof-backed terminal outcomes or leave explicit blockers in CLOSEOUT.md.

token_policy.default_model_routing: explicit lower-cost openai/gpt-5.4-mini for plan/verify/contained packets; openai/gpt-5.4 only for core authority execution
token_policy.strong_model_only_when: authority design or invasive implementation genuinely requires it

anti_requirements: Do not widen beyond listed bug IDs.
Do not resolve FIXED without validates_fix evidence.
Do not use ad hoc SQL for bug status or evidence writes.
Do not create wrapper scripts for behavior that belongs in runtime, registry, event bus, or DB authority.
Use praxis workflow discover before implementing new code or patterns.

jobs.label: Plan architecture packet
jobs.prompt:
Orient from Praxis.db standing orders first. Then use praxis workflow discover/recall as needed to plan this packet.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-9BB04947 [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: Database environment authority is split across shell bootstrap, runtime, surface resolvers, and tests
- BUG-DFC8607C [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: Native service lifecycle is spread across launch scripts, runtime CQRS, surfaces, heartbeat, and setup checks

Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-architecture-1/PLAN.md with: authority model, files to read, files allowed to change, verification path, stop boundary, and per-bug intended outcome. Do not edit code in this job.

jobs.label: Execute architecture packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-architecture-1/PLAN.md first. Implement the smallest durable fix or document a proof-backed DEFERRED/WONT_FIX outcome.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-9BB04947 [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: Database environment authority is split across shell bootstrap, runtime, surface resolvers, and tests
- BUG-DFC8607C [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: Native service lifecycle is spread across launch scripts, runtime CQRS, surfaces, heartbeat, and setup checks

Rules: use praxis workflow discover before new code; keep writes inside the active Praxis workspace boundary; do not cross Coder/Recruiter boundaries; do not resolve bugs in this job. Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-architecture-1/EXECUTION.md with changed files, evidence collected, and intended terminal status per bug.

jobs.label: Verify and resolve architecture packet
jobs.prompt:
Read Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-architecture-1/PLAN.md and Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-architecture-1/EXECUTION.md. Run the narrowest meaningful verifier. Use only praxis workflow bugs attach_evidence and praxis workflow bugs resolve for bug state.

Bugs in scope:
- BUG-9BB04947 [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: Database environment authority is split across shell bootstrap, runtime, surface resolvers, and tests
- BUG-DFC8607C [P1/ARCHITECTURE]: Native service lifecycle is spread across launch scripts, runtime CQRS, surfaces, heartbeat, and setup checks

If verification fails, leave the bug open and record the blocker. Write Code&DBs/Workflow/artifacts/workflow/bug_resolution_program/current_20260424/wave-1-core-authority-architecture-1/CLOSEOUT.md with proof, commands, status outcome, and unresolved risks.
